title: SPINE: Deploying Foundation Model-Enabled Robots in the Field (Ravichandran et al., 2025)
venue: IEEE ICRA Workshop on Field Robotics 2025
venue_full: IEEE ICRA Workshop on Field Robotics 2025
tldr: 提出 SPINE——一个LLM驱动的模块化自主框架，首次在非结构化野外环境中实现公里级规模的LLM机器人规划，并首次演示了在机载设备上运行蒸馏后轻量语言模型的UAV规划器。论文系统总结了在野外部署FM驱动机器人的经验教训和开放挑战。
pdf_name: Ravichandran et al. - 2025 - Deploying foundation model-enabled air and ground robots in the field Challenges and opportunities.pdf
